meaning: adj.分子中含有三个醋酸基的,三醋酸基的
examples: Under this conditions, the yield of glyceryl triacetate was up to 94%.
Glyceryl triacetate was synthesized from acetic acid and glycerine using immobilized catalyst.
Crystalline structure and thermal property of cellulose triacetate and cellulose diacetate were studied.
